decisions.decision: RBAC uses role string enum (user/tester/moderator/admin), not boolean is_admin
decisions.rationale: More flexible for future roles; require_admin and require_tester deps gate by role value

decisions.decision: Tracing is fire-and-forget via _record_trace() that never raises
decisions.rationale: Keeps ingestion pipeline behavior identical; traces are purely observability

decisions.decision: Debug endpoints gated by require_tester (allows tester and admin roles)
decisions.rationale: Allows QA testers to use debug controls without full admin; aligns with RBAC plan

next_action: Re-run /gsd-execute-phase 11 to resume Wave 2. Orchestrator will skip 11-01/11-02 (have SUMMARYs) and execute 11-03 Task 2 + full 11-04. Or complete manually: (1) finish AdminInspectorDrawer.tsx + wire ProfileScreen for 11-03, create SUMMARY; (2) commit debug.py + main.py, build ConnectorsTab/DebugScreen/SettingsScreen/App.tsx for 11-04, create SUMMARY.
